quizSubtitle: Test your knowledge of this ancient canal.
passMessage: You have earned the Grand Canal Shipping Company license!
failMessage: Keep trying! A deeper understanding of the canal's history will lead to success.
correctFeedback1: You are a true historian! Even Emperor Yang would want you as an advisor!
correctFeedback2: Amazing! It seems you've sailed the Grand Canal on your own dragon boat.
correctFeedback3: Correct! Your knowledge is as deep as the Grand Canal itself.
incorrectFeedback1: Oh no, you almost convinced the canal official!
incorrectFeedback2: Don't worry, even the boatmen of the past might not have known this.
incorrectFeedback3: This question seems to be in deep water. Try the next one!
